Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
October 21, 2025
• VLCCs Remains Supported as Charterers Consider New Trade Barriers -
Short-term Indicators
Following a subdued start to October, the VLCC segment shows early signs of
Momentum: Neutral
support. In the Arabian Gulf, owners resisted further downward pressure amid a
tightening tonnage list and expectations of increased activity linked to Saudi's Sentiment: Neutral
November loading programs. Furthermore, sentiment improved as charterers Fundamentals: Positive
sought early cover in response to China's recently implemented port fees on U.S.-
linked vessels.
